name: adult no corn, wheat, soy savory stew with chicken & zucchini dog food
description: hill's science diet adult savory stew with chicken & zucchini no corn, wheat, soy is a delicious way to provide precisely balanced nutrition that enhances the overall health and well-being of your pet. made with real chicken, brown rice, and a medley of delectable vegetables including peas and carrots, all smothered in a delicious gravy. high-quality protein for lean muscles made with purposeful ingredients for a flavorful, nutritious meal easy to digest omega-6 fatty acids & vitamin e for beautiful skin & coat pair this mouth watering stew with hill's science diet dry food to indulge your dog
